description_long: This is a traditional wooden clog featuring a solid, light-colored wooden sole and a brown leather upper. The upper is attached to the sole with visible metal rivets along the edge, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. The shoe has a closed toe and an open heel, making it a slip-on style. The leather upper is slightly curved and covers the top of the foot, while the wooden sole is thick and robust, providing durability and support. The overall shape is ergonomic, with a slightly raised heel and a broad, rounded toe box. The materials and construction suggest it is designed for practical use, likely in outdoor or work environments.
description: A traditional wooden clog with a brown leather upper, metal rivets, and a solid light wood sole. The shoe is slip-on with a closed toe and open heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open heel and the interior of the wooden sole.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the brown leather upper, metal rivets, and the full profile of the wooden sole.
description_view_2: Toe view highlighting the rounded closed toe and the riveted edge of the leather upper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the leather upper, rivets, and the open heel structure.
